content.seo_title: Freelance Pitching: How to Solve 'Can't Debug Code' Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with broken code. Learn how to leverage freelance pitching and AI tools like Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver faster results.
content.answer_block: When you hit a debugging wall, stop spinning your wheels. Shift your workflow by using AI agents to isolate logic errors while you pivot to high-value freelance pitching. By offloading technical debt to tools like Claude Code, you free up billable hours to secure better clients and scale your revenue.
content.intro:
The screen flickers, the console logs are a graveyard of cryptic errors, and your deadline is breathing down your neck. You’re a freelancer, not a martyr; staring at a syntax error for four hours isn't 'paying your dues,' it's killing your margins. The difference between a struggling coder and a high-earning architect is the ability to outsource the grind to intelligent systems.

We are moving beyond manual debugging into the era of AI-orchestrated development. By integrating Antigravity and Claude Code into your stack, you turn your most frustrating roadblocks into automated tasks. This isn't just about fixing bugs; it's about reclaiming your time to focus on what actually moves the needle: pitching clients and shipping production-ready features.

steps.title: Analyze the Failure State
steps.description: Before fixing, you must define the failure. Use AI to scan your entire codebase for logical inconsistencies that aren't throwing standard errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the codebase for silent failure points in the state management logic. Provide a list of potential race conditions.

steps.title: Isolate the Bug with AI
steps.description: Don't touch the code yet. Force the AI to pinpoint the exact line causing the runtime exception to save time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify the specific module causing the memory leak in the current production build.

steps.title: Generate the Fix
steps.description: Apply a surgical fix rather than a broad rewrite. This preserves your architectural integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a patch for the identified bug that adheres to existing project patterns and minimizes side effects.

steps.title: Automated Regression Testing
steps.description: Ensure the fix didn't break secondary systems by running an AI-driven test suite.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write and execute unit tests for the newly patched module to confirm the bug is resolved.

steps.title: Package for Client Review
steps.description: Document the fix in a professional summary, turning the 'debugging' time into a value-add report for the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize the technical resolution in a professional format suitable for a client status update email.

pro_tips: Always use a dedicated feature branch for AI-generated patches to maintain a clean git history for client audits.
Never accept the first AI suggestion; ask it to provide three alternative approaches and pick the most performant one.
Treat your debug logs as product documentation; feed them into your AI context to identify recurring client pain points.
Use Claude Code's CLI to automate your deployment pipeline, reducing manual 'push-and-pray' cycles.
Leverage your saved debugging time to draft a 'Proactive Maintenance' pitch for your client, increasing your recurring monthly revenue.
content.next_steps: Now that your codebase is stable, package this process into a 'Maintenance Retainer' proposal and send it to your top three clients.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the strategy. Now you just need to execute. Stop letting technical debt dictate your income. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
